suppress.notes: spring-security-core-6.5.9.jar: CVE-2018-1258 only applies when used with spring-framework 5.0.5, which is not in this project. Added: 2026-04-17

spring-security-crypto-6.5.9.jar: CVE-2018-1258 only applies when used with spring-framework 5.0.5, which is not in this project. The NVD CPE cpe:/a:pivotal_software:spring_security matches all spring-security artifacts including crypto, but the vulnerability is context-specific to framework 5.0.5. Added: 2026-04-20

spring-security-crypto-6.5.10.jar: CVE-2018-1258 only applies when used with spring-framework 5.0.5, which is not in this project. The NVD CPE cpe:/a:pivotal_software:spring_security matches all spring-security artifacts including crypto, but the vulnerability is context-specific to framework 5.0.5. Added: 2026-04-20
spring-security-core-6.5.10.jar: CVE-2018-1258 only applies when used with spring-framework 5.0.5, which is not in this project. Added: 2026-04-20

False positive: cpe:/a:google:protobuf is language-agnostic and matches the Java artifact, but vulnerabilities under this CPE (e.g. CVE-2026-0994) target the Python protobuf library's json_format.py — code that does not exist in the Java implementation. Suppressing the CPE match rather than individual CVEs prevents recurrence as new Python-only CVEs are published under the same CPE. Version-agnostic: applies to all protobuf-java versions without SHA1 pinning. Added: 2026-05-20
